findings.description: Generated adversarial borderline compliance cases for manual review

adversarial_cases.text: We hope to resolve this matter amicably, but please be aware that unresolved accounts may lead to further actions that could impact your financial standing.
adversarial_cases.expected_violation: Threatening legal action without explicit language

adversarial_cases.text: Our team is here to assist you in reviewing your account details and finding the best way forward. Many have found it helpful to discuss their situation with us directly.
We understand that times can be tough, and we want to help you navigate through this. However, it's important to address your outstanding balance to avoid further complications.

findings.action_taken: Logged for review. Compliance checker patterns may need updating.
